reviews.comment:
Buena opción para descansar un rato...hay espacios verdes para bajar a estirar las piernas y pasear a las mascotas. Hay opciones para comer y el café del shop es excelente!!!

(Translated by Google)
A great place to relax for a while...there are green spaces to stretch your legs and walk your pets. There are places to eat and the coffee at the shop is excellent!

reviews.comment:
Bueno, aquí el problema persiste. El ACA no se esmera en poner más empleados en temporadas ni días pico. No se respetan el precio de las ofertas. El personal de atención al público, es muy lento, se ve que a menudo cambian de empleados y hay poco personal para atender al turista. La responsabilidad es de la persona que tiene la concesión.  No le interesa mejorar el servicio. Los baños muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Well, the problem persists here. The ACA doesn't make an effort to hire more staff during peak seasons or days. They don't honor advertised prices. The customer service staff is very slow; it's clear they frequently change employees, and there's not enough staff to assist tourists. The responsibility lies with the concession holder. They have no interest in improving the service. The restrooms are very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOd3NIT0p3EAE
